# Scheme Profile: HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth
**Source Citation URL:** https://groww.in/mutual-funds/hdfc-gold-etf-fund-of-fund-direct-plan-growth
**AMC:** HDFC Mutual Fund
**Category:** Commodities (Gold)
**Risk Level:** Moderately High Riskometer
**Launch Date:** 01-Jan-2013
**Lock-in Period:** No lock-in period
**Benchmark Index:** Domestic Price of Gold (Domestic Price of Gold)

## Investment Objective
The Scheme seeks to generate capital appreciation by investing in units of HDFC Gold Exchange Traded Fund.

## Current NAV (Net Asset Value)
*   **NAV:** ₹48.9072 per unit
*   **As of Date:** 26-May-2026

## Key Fees, Fund Size & Investment Details
*   **Expense Ratio:** 0.21% per annum (annual management fee)
*   **Exit Load:** Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 15 days.
*   **Fund Size (AUM):** ₹11,464.35 Crores
*   **Minimum SIP Investment:** ₹100 per month
*   **Minimum Lumpsum Investment:** ₹100

## Fund Management
### Arun Agarwal
*   **Education:** Mr. Agarwal is a B.Com. and Chartered Accountant
*   **Experience:** Prior to joining HDFC Asset Management Company Limited, he has worked with SBI Funds Management Pvt. Ltd., ICICI Bank Limited, UTI Asset Management Pvt. Ltd.
### Nandita Menezes
*   **Education:** CA (ICAI, INDIA), B.Com (University of Mumbai)
*   **Experience:** Prior to joining HDFC AMC, she was associated with S.V. Ghatalia & Associates LLP.

## Top Stock Holdings (by Portfolio Weight)
| Company Name | Sector | Weight (%) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| HDFC Gold ETF |  | 100.1% |
